ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recordings" (
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recording */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject being recorded */,
  "recording_date" TEXT /* Date of the recording session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recording session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location where the recording took place */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the recording session */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Details about the equipment used for the recording */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the recording is part of */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the recording */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recordings_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recordings_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recordings_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording this frame belongs to */,
  "frame_number" TEXT /* The specific frame number in the recording */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The exact timestamp of the frame */,
  "frame_rate" INTEGER /* The frame rate of the recording */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* The resolution of the frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frames_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marker_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marker position entry */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame this position belongs to */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marker being tracked */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X coordinate of the marker */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y coordinate of the marker */,
  "z_coordinate" REAL /* Z coordinate of the marker */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the marker position */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used to capture the marker position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marker_positions_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marker_positions_marker_id FOREIGN KEY ("marker_id") REFERENCES markers ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the subject */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the subject */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the subject */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the subject */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions of the subject */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the subject entry */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the subject entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markers" (
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marker */,
  "marker_type" TEXT /* Type of the marker (e.g., reflective, active) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marker's characteristics */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the marker */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the marker */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the marker entry */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the marker entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markers_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recording_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recording condition entry */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording this condition pertains to */,
  "lighting" TEXT /* Lighting conditions during the recording */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the recording */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the recording */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the recording */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the recording (if outdoor) */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity during the recording */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the condition entry */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the condition entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recording_conditions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recording_conditions_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recording_conditions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., animator, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user entry */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the recording */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the recording was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the recording */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from where the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recording_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made during the revision */,
  "revised_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "reason_for_revision" TEXT /* Reason for the revision */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the revision entry */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the revision entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recording_revisions_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recording_revisions_revised_by FOREIGN KEY ("revised_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording used for the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., 2D plot, 3D model) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
